title: Step 3: JMAP Chat data types
description: Implement types:: module: all ~20 JMAP Chat data types from draft-atwood-jmap-chat-00.md (Chat, Message, Space, ChatContact, ChatMember, SpaceRole, SpaceMember, Category, SpaceInvite, SpaceBan, ReadPosition, PresenceStatus, CustomEmoji, Attachment, Mention, MessageAction, Reaction, MessageRevision, Endpoint). Use #[non_exhaustive] on spec-mirroring enums. Unit tests for optional fields, enum variants, nested objects. Fixtures in crates/jmap-chat/tests/fixtures/.
